core.database.repositories.samples module

SAMPLES REPOSITORY – Handles high-frequency sample insertion

PURPOSE:

Contains logic for inserting high-frequency samples: - Energy samples (RAPL) - CPU samples (utilization, frequency) - Interrupt samples

WHY THIS EXISTS:

  • Separates sample insertion from other database operations

  • Handles large batch inserts efficiently

  • Part of splitting the god object manager.py

AUTHOR: Deepak Panigrahy

class core.database.repositories.samples.SamplesRepository(db: DatabaseInterface)[source]

Bases: object

Repository for high-frequency samples.

Handles insertion of time-series data from various sensors.

insert_cpu_samples(run_id: int, samples: List[Dict[str, Any]]) → None[source]

Insert CPU samples.

insert_energy_samples(run_id: int, samples: List[Dict[str, Any]]) → None[source]

Insert high-frequency RAPL samples.

Parameters:

  • run_id – Foreign key to runs table

  • samples – List of sample dictionaries

insert_interrupt_samples(run_id: int, samples: List[Dict[str, Any]]) → None[source]

Insert interrupt samples.

Parameters:

  • run_id – Foreign key to runs table

  • samples – List of sample dictionaries
